prompt: { "type": "travel journal scrapbook page", "style": "hand-drawn bullet journal, textured beige paper background, blue and red ink handwriting, masking tape, polaroid-style photos, sketch doodles", "header": { "title": "{argument name=\"city name\" default=\"北京\"}", "subtitle": "{argument name=\"city name english\" default=\"Beijing\"}", "location_text": "地理位置：中国首都，位于华北平原北部，燕山南麓。", "doodle": "traditional Chinese gate building" }, "photos": { "count": 4, "descriptions": [ "Forbidden City at sunset with masking tape", "Great Wall of China landscape with masking tape", "Beihai Park with white stupa", "Traditional Hutong alleyway with red lanterns" ] }, "layout": { "sections": [ { "title": "最佳游览季节：", "position": "mid-left", "labels": [ "春季 (4-5月) 和秋季 (9-11月)" ], "doodles": [ "two leaves", "sun" ] }, { "title": "Map and Lion", "position": "mid-right", "labels": [ "北京", "故宫门前的石狮子，超有气势！" ], "doodles": [ "map with red dot", "stone guardian lion" ] }, { "title": "主要看点 & 特色", "position": "left-middle", "count": 3, "labels": [ "{argument name=\"main attraction 1\" default=\"故宫 (紫禁城)\"}", "{argument name=\"main attraction 2\" default=\"八达岭长城\"}", "什刹海 & 胡同" ], "doodles": [ "traditional pavilion", "Great Wall segment", "traditional house" ] }, { "title": "特别推荐！", "position": "bottom-right", "count": 2, "labels": [ "天坛公园 (祈年殿)", "南锣鼓巷" ], "doodles": [ "Temple of Heaven" ], "style": "outlined in red ink" }, { "title": "必尝美食！", "position": "bottom-left", "count": 3, "labels": [ "{argument name=\"must try food 1\" default=\"北京烤鸭\"}", "炸酱面", "豆汁儿 (勇敢者挑战！)" ], "doodles": [ "duck head", "bowl of noodles" ] }, { "title": "小贴士：", "position": "bottom-left-center", "count": 2, "labels": [ "景点较大，建议穿舒适的鞋子！", "提前预约门票，节假日人多哦～" ] } ], "footer": { "quote": "走遍千山万水，最爱还是北京！", "doodles": [ "camera", "Bird's Nest stadium", "CCTV tower skyline" ] } } }
translatedPrompt: { "type": "旅行手账页面", "style": "手绘子弹笔记，纹理米色纸背景，蓝红墨水手写体，美纹纸胶带，拍立得风格照片，草图涂鸦", "header": { "title": "{argument name=\"city name\" default=\"北京\"}", "subtitle": "{argument name=\"city name english\" default=\"Beijing\"}", "location_text": "地理位置：中国首都，位于华北平原北部，燕山南麓。", "doodle": "传统中式城门建筑" }, "photos": { "count": 4, "descriptions": [ "日落时分的故宫，带有美纹纸胶带", "长城景观，带有美纹纸胶带", "北海公园白塔", "挂满红灯笼的传统胡同小巷" ] }, "layout": { "sections": [ { "title": "最佳游览季节：", "position": "mid-left", "labels": [ "春季 (4-5月) 和秋季 (9-11月)" ], "doodles": [ "两片叶子", "太阳" ] }, { "title": "地图与石狮", "position": "mid-right", "labels": [ "北京", "故宫门前的石狮子，超有气势！" ], "doodles": [ "带有红点的地图", "石狮子" ] }, { "title": "主要看点 & 特色", "position": "left-middle", "count": 3, "labels": [ "{argument name=\"main attraction 1\" default=\"故宫 (紫禁城)\"}", "{argument name=\"main attraction 2\" default=\"八达岭长城\"}", "什刹海 & 胡同" ], "doodles": [ "传统凉亭", "长城片段", "传统民居" ] }, { "title": "特别推荐！", "position": "bottom-right", "count": 2, "labels": [ "天坛公园 (祈年殿)", "南锣鼓巷" ], "doodles": [ "天坛" ], "style": "红色墨水勾边" }, { "title": "必尝美食！", "position": "bottom-left", "count": 3, "labels": [ "{argument name=\"must try food 1\" default=\"北京烤鸭\"}", "炸酱面", "豆汁儿 (勇敢者挑战！)" ], "doodles": [ "鸭头", "一碗面条" ] }, { "title": "小贴士：", "position": "bottom-left-center", "count": 2, "labels": [ "景点较大，建议穿舒适的鞋子！", "提前预约门票，节假日人多哦～" ] } ], "footer": { "quote": "走遍千山万水，最爱还是北京！", "doodles": [ "相机", "鸟巢体育场", "央视大楼天际线" ] } }

breakdown.creativeCore: 旅行手账风格信息图：生成一张手绘子弹笔记风格的旅行信息图，包含胶带照片、涂鸦草图以及用于城市指南的分类文本板块。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.bestUse: 城市美食地图、活动导览、园区地图、旅行视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
